name: elegy-memory
description: Governed skill definition for the shipped Elegy-memory V1 surface: summary-only session-context inspection and validation plus local non-authoritative artifact import, list, show, export, supersede, and tombstone flows.

metadata.summary: Bounded local non-authoritative artifact management over governed summary-only session-context envelopes.

triggers.description: When work involves Elegy's bounded summary-only memory surface.
When inspecting or validating governed summary-only session-context envelopes.
When managing the local non-authoritative artifact store.
When recording local lineage that one artifact copy supersedes another.
When recording local withdrawal of an artifact copy without changing host runtime authority.

constraints.description: Local import accepts governed summary-only-session-context-envelope artifacts only.
This surface must not claim currentness, approval, freshness, retrieval ranking, runtime validation, or promotion authority.
Local store mutations are single-writer; concurrent writers are rejected.

parameters.name: command
parameters.description: One of inspect-session-context, validate-session-context, init, import, list, show, export, supersede, or tombstone.

parameters.name: root
parameters.description: Optional local artifact root. Defaults to .elegy-local-memory.

parameters.name: input
parameters.description: Path to a governed summary-only-session-context-envelope artifact for validation or local import.

parameters.name: recordId
parameters.description: Record identifier for show, export, supersede, or tombstone flows.

parameters.name: outputPath
parameters.description: Optional explicit export destination for exported summary-only envelopes.

parameters.name: importedAtUtc
parameters.description: UTC timestamp recorded during local import.

parameters.name: tombstonedAtUtc
parameters.description: UTC timestamp recorded for a local tombstone action.

parameters.name: reason
parameters.description: Required reason text for a local tombstone action.

output.description: Command-scoped inspection, validation, record, list, or export reports for the local non-authoritative memory surface.
